name: TransferOwnership
description: Customer needs to transfer their Virgin Media account to a different person — either because of bereavement, relationship breakdown, moving out of a shared property, or another change in household circumstances. This is about changing who owns the account, not updating personal details on the existing account holder's record.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need to transfer my account to my {newOrOldOwner}
How do I change the account holder?
I want to put the account in my {newOrOldOwner} 's name
The account needs to be transferred because {accountTransferOwnershipReason}
I'm {accountTransferOwnershipReason} and need to transfer the broadband to my {newOrOldOwner}
How do I transfer ownership of my broadband?
My {newOrOldOwner} is taking over the account
I need to report a bereavement and transfer the account
Someone has passed away and I need to take over their Virgin Media account
{accountTransferOwnershipReason} — I need the account moved to a different name
Can the account be put into my name instead?
We've {accountTransferOwnershipReason} and the account is in my ex's name
I'm moving out and my {newOrOldOwner} is keeping the broadband
The person who set up the account no longer lives here
I've just moved into a property that has Virgin Media — can I take it over?
I want to change who the account is registered to
My {newOrOldOwner} needs to be the new account holder
How do I take over an existing Virgin Media account?
The account holder has {accountTransferOwnershipReason} and I need to sort out the account
Can I transfer my broadband account to someone else?
I want to hand over my account to my {newOrOldOwner}
transfer account ownership
